summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Exatouch POS page at /pos/exatouch completed successfully. All 14 features tested and passed.

passed: Page loads at /pos/exatouch with correct title and meta description
Hero section displays with correct heading, description, and two CTA buttons (Schedule Demo, Get Quote)
Industry vertical tabs (Grocery & Convenience, Liquor Stores, Retail Stores, Smoke & Tobacco Shops) switch content when clicked
Core features grid displays 6 feature cards with proper data-testid attributes
Hardware section displays with equipment list and $39/mo pricing
Scan Data Integration section with 4-step process and 3 stat cards ($0.15, Quarterly, Automatic)
Free offers section displays 4 offer cards (Training, Installation, Gift Card, 24/7 Support)
Payments section displays with 5 payment types (EMV Chip, Contactless, Cash Discounting, Offline Processing, Gift Card)
FAQ section with 8 accordion items that expand/collapse correctly
Final CTA section with two buttons (Schedule Demo, Get Quote)
Quote modal opens when 'Get a Free Quote' button is clicked - shows Lead Connector iframe
Demo modal opens when 'Schedule a Free Demo' button is clicked - shows Calendly widget
Navigation link 'Exatouch POS' appears under POS & Hardware dropdown and navigates correctly
SEO footer section displays with keywords (Exatouch POS system, grocery store POS, liquor store point of sale, etc.)

critical_code_review_comments: All data-testid attributes are properly implemented for testing
Shadcn Accordion component used correctly for FAQ section
Modal implementations follow good patterns with backdrop click to close
All images (6 total) loaded successfully with no broken images
context_for_next_testing_agent: Exatouch POS page is fully functional. All sections, modals, tabs, and navigation work correctly. The page follows similar patterns to SpecialtyMerchant.jsx. Modals use iframes for Lead Connector (quote form) and Calendly (demo scheduling).
